usage: Login page screenshot-derived page background layer. UI controls, text, shield, form panel, and footer panel regions are masked before inpainting so this is not a whole UI screenshot resource.
scope: approved page background only for non-business login/auth route

masked_regions.reason: remove full login form/panel UI from background asset
remove hero shield UI from background asset
remove product title and subtitle UI from background asset
remove capability buttons UI from background asset
remove assurance text list UI from background asset

source.processing: OpenCV inpaint after masking UI regions; output remains a background layer and excludes business page UI screenshots.

policy: Allowed by explicit relaxed gate: page backgrounds may be replicated; business-page UI screenshots and API-driven business diagrams remain forbidden as resources.
